## Pre-burst off-window rule landed (e123-e133)

Read off-selection block in fixed `window_optimize.py`. Added pre-burst preference. Initial attempt (subordinate to off_snr gate) DIDN'T fire for chromatica — pre-run [0,129] exists+adequate but off_snr=5.92 fails gate, only post-run passes at 2.93. Investigated: both segments sit at high standardized baseline (~55-60), so off_snr doesn't separate them, yet α recovery is unambiguous. **Restructured: pre-burst preference made PRIMARY over off_snr gate** — take largest adequate (≥OFF_MIN_BINS=50) pre-burst run outright; fall back to off_snr gate only when no adequate pre-burst run exists (preserves oran rising-envelope fix). Added `OFF_MIN_BINS=50` constant (matches bandpass-norm off-bin floor `_MIN_OFF`).

## Final config-path rerun + pinned triad (e134-e145)

Reran full 12-burst campaign (`campaign_final`). First run: pre-burst rule still didn't fire for chromatica (validity-span slicing). After making it primary, rerun gives **chromatica off=[9,138] pre-burst, α=+1.68±0.35 n=4, ladder 0.093/0.074/0.031/0.050 over 720/585/497/433 MHz (NOT strictly monotonic — 433 MHz 0.050 rises above 497 MHz 0.031); zach α=+1.99±0.48 n=3 (off[22,175]); freya n/a (1445 MHz subband rails γ=20, off[6,228]) MARGINAL; hamilton +8.94±3.16 n=2 diagnostic-only.** All 12 bursts now use pre-burst off-windows (freya off[6,228] ends before burst 252; casey off[5,834] before burst 885). Remaining 8 bursts n/a (unresolved or m>1.2 rails). Recorded to memory (mem_6eb218713b5d, later corrected). Two Auditor findings addressed: (a) freya "−0.56" comment value rebutted as correct (traces to background test POST[302,446]→−0.5593); (b) "monotonic" descriptor acknowledged as inaccurate (0.050 > 0.031 not monotone), memory row corrected.

## Content shown in later conversation (not this span's tail — for continuity only)

The span ends mid-work at e145 (checksumming ladder figures). Events after the listed range (owner ruling "go with the physically defensible option - always"; two_band_joint.py dual-track computation; twoband_scint_summary.png; finalization PR#201 creation at `scint/finalization-two-band-2026-07-17` off main tip 8f5f06a4; ladder figure re-save v3 for stale-checksum Auditor finding) belong to subsequent turns.
